preamble: The deaffrication of the voiceless retroflex affricate [ʈʂ] into a voiceless retroflex stop [ʈ]. This reduction process simplifies the complex articulation by removing the fricative release.

examples.note: Common reduction in rapid speech or as a process of simplifying sibilant inventories.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
